Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's cover some of the different weapons available to aircraft based on their loadouts.

Sea Power uses a standardized loadout system, where every aircraft has a set of pre-built loadouts that can be used. Given that this simulation takes place at the 'commander' level, modification of loadouts with specific weapons by the player is not necessary or required.
To best explain different weapon types, let's look at some of the standard loadouts available to our carrier aircraft.
